Mulina lya Allah, Jwaukoto wejinji, Jwachanasa channope.
Lumbili losope lwene alapikwe Allah, M'mbuje jwa iwumbe yosope.Footnote-1
Kwele Jikape tukwagalagatila, soni Kwele Jikape tukwaŵenda chikamuchisyo.
Litala lya aŵala ŵanya ŵamwapele chindimba,Footnote-3 ngaŵaga ŵaŵatumbililidwe (aŵala ŵaŵaimanyi yakuona nikuileka), kapena ŵaŵasokonechele (aŵala ŵaŵailesile yakuona ligongo lya ujinga ni kupotela).
